title: Front 02 (Q36)
markdown_content: Which statement is true about the async attribute for the HTML script tag?

title: Front 02 (Q36)
markdown_content: It can be used for both internal and external JavaScript code.

title: Front 02 (Q36)
markdown_content: It can be used only for internal JavaScript code.

title: Front 02 (Q36)
markdown_content: It can be used only for internal or external JavaScript code that exports a promise.

title: Front 02 (Q36)
markdown_content: It can be used only for external JavaScript code.

title: Front 02 (Q36)
markdown_content: Resource(s): - Scripts: async, defer.

title: Front 03 (Q48)

title: Front 03 (Q48)
markdown_content: The defer attribute can work synchronously.

title: Front 03 (Q48)
markdown_content: The defer attribute works only with generators.

title: Front 03 (Q48)
markdown_content: The defer attribute works only with promises.

title: Front 03 (Q48)
markdown_content: The defer attribute will asynchronously load the scripts in order.

title: Front 12 (Q108)
markdown_content:
//HTML Markup
<div id="A">
  <div id="B">
    <div id="C">Click Here</div>
  </div>
</div>
//JavaScript
document.querySelectorAll('div').forEach((e) => {
  e.onclick = (e) => console.log(e.currentTarget.id);
});

What is the output that is printed when the div containing the text "Click Here" is clicked?

title: Front 18 (Q149)
markdown_content: Which statement is applicable to the defer attribute of the HTML <script> tag?

title: Front 18 (Q149)
markdown_content: defer allows the browser to continue processing the page while the script loads in the background.

title: Front 18 (Q149)
markdown_content: defer causes the script to be loaded from the backup content delivery network (CDN).

title: Front 18 (Q149)
markdown_content: defer blocks the browser from processing HTML below the tag until the script is completely loaded.

title: Front 18 (Q149)
markdown_content: defer lazy loads the script, causing it to download only when it is called by another script on the page.

title: Front 18 (Q149)
markdown_content: Resource(s): - Scripts: async, defer.

title: Front 19 (Q154)
markdown_content:
<h2 id="cleverest">girls</h2>

How would you change the color of this header to pink?

title: Front 19 (Q154)
markdown_content: Resource(s): - Document: getElementsByName() method. - Element: getElementsByTagName() method. getElementsByTagName() returns an HTMLCollection. Note that the answer document.getElementsByTagName("h2")[0].style.color = "pink"; would have been OK. - Document: getElementById() method.
